name: Raw Beet And Herb Salad
intro: Place the carrots, fennel, and 2 tablespoons of the lemon juice in a large bowl

ingredients.item: medium beets, peeled and cut into thin strips (2¼ cups/300 g)
tbsp/75 ml olive oil salt and black pepper

method: Mix together the almonds and sesame and pumpkin seeds and spread out on a baking sheet. Place in the oven and roast for 6 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside to cool.
Place the beets, herbs, chile flakes, and lemon zest in a large bowl. Add the seeds and nuts, lemon juice, olive oil, ¼ teaspoon salt, and a grind of black
pepper. Toss together and serve at once.
